title.en: SUPERHEATING OF STEAM
Steam superheating characterised by heating method
{the heat being supplied by steam}
with heat supply by hot flue gases from the furnace of the steam boiler
with heat supply predominantly by radiation
with provision for superheating by throttling
by mixing steam with furnace gases or other combustion products
using heat generated by chemical reactions
by using a separate heat source independent from heat supply of the steam boiler, e.g. by electricity, by auxiliary combustion of fuel oil
Steam superheaters characterised by constructional features; Details or component parts thereof
{Steam tube arrangements not dependent of location}
{Superheater drain arrangements}
{Steam tubes with steam flowing in opposite directions in one pipe, e.g. Field tubes (F22G3/005 takes precedence)}
{Annular steam tubes, i.e. the steam being heated between concentric tubes with the heating fluid flowing in inner and around outer tube}
{Steam superheaters with heating tubes (F22G3/005 takes precedence)}
{Headers; Collectors, e.g. for mixing}
{Protection of superheater elements, e.g. cooling superheater tubes during starting-up periods, water tube screens}
{Connecting or sealing of superheater or reheater tubes with collectors or distributors}
Controlling superheat temperature
Applications of combustion-control devices, e.g. tangential-firing burners, tilting burners
by regulating flue gas flow, e.g. by proportioning or diverting
by recirculating flue gases
by displacing superheater sections
by attemperating the superheated steam, e.g. by injected water sprays
by indirectly cooling or heating the superheated steam in auxiliary enclosed heat-exchanger
by by-passing steam around superheater sections
by combined controlling procedures
Steam superheaters characterised by location, arrangement, or disposition
{for locomotive boilers (F22G7/065, F22G7/105 take precedence)}
in fire tubes
in jackets around fire tubes
in furnace tubes
in fire-boxes
in smoke-boxes
in flues
in water-tube boilers, e.g. between banks of water tubes
